meta.private_notes:
Two shots for Minnesota were taken that I was informed did not register in the program and I was unable to edit.  #26 with 3:07 remaining in the second period from right in front of the goal, and #27 with 47 seconds remaining in the period from the left face off circle.  We've reviewed time on ice and it reflects the players were on the ice at those times.

And confirming that the Minnesota goalie #35 was pulled at 18:42 of the 3rd period and returned to the goal at 19:08.
